meta.description: Verificação aritmética do ciclo maia de 52 anos e candidatos astrofísicos

astrophysical_candidates.name: Jupiter-Saturn synodic conjunction
astrophysical_candidates.note: 2.62 is irrational — not a clean integer; |52.03-52|=0.03yr algebraically close

astrophysical_candidates.name: Venus synodic period
astrophysical_candidates.reference: [E] Dresden Codex records 5 Venus synodic periods = 2920 days = 8 haab
astrophysical_candidates.note: 18980/583.92 ≈ 32.50; half-integer; 5 synodic periods = 8 Haab is the documented Maya synchrony [E]

best_algebraic_match.name: Schwabe solar cycle
best_algebraic_match.note: Melhor correspondência algébrica — requer efemérides para confirmação física
